about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Building intelligent systems that make a real difference
about.bio_1: I'm a Full-Stack AI Engineer focused on building intelligent systems that go beyond prototypes and deliver real-world impact. I combine software engineering with artificial intelligence to design, develop, and deploy scalable products powered by data and LLMs.
about.bio_2: My work is centered on turning complex ideas into functional solutions — from backend architecture and APIs to intuitive user experiences. I'm especially interested in creating AI-driven applications that solve meaningful problems and push the boundaries of what technology can do.
about.bio_3: I don't just write code — I build systems that think, learn, and evolve.
about.quote: Build software that solves real problems.

github.title: GitHub Activity
github.subtitle: A live look at my open-source contributions, coding streak, and most-used languages.

footer.tagline: Building intelligent systems that make a real difference.

techstack.typescript: My go-to language across every serious project — typed React SPAs, Angular apps, and Next.js full-stack builds.
techstack.python: Built an autonomous WhatsApp sales agent with LangGraph and a FastAPI service with async endpoints and a PostgreSQL checkpointer.
techstack.java: Developed the full Cobamovil backend — JWT auth, role-based access control, JPA/Hibernate entities, and Flyway migrations.
techstack.javascript: Wrote the Node.js gateway for the WhatsApp agent — webhooks, session handling, and Prisma ORM integration.
techstack.html: Structured every web project with semantic, accessible markup — from portfolio sections to Angular templates.
techstack.css: Crafted the blob keyframes, scroll animations, and custom scrollbar that make this portfolio feel alive.
techstack.react: Built this portfolio and unit-testing playground — hooks, context API, lazy loading, and Framer Motion transitions.
techstack.nextjs: Shipped Defect Insights (AI manufacturing dashboard) and MathScope using App Router, Server Components, and Genkit AI.
techstack.angular: Delivered the Cobamovil mobile frontend — reactive forms, lazy-loaded modules, HTTP interceptors, and role guards.
techstack.nodejs: Powered the WhatsApp sales agent gateway — REST API, WPPConnect sessions, and real-time webhook handling.
techstack.fastapi: Served the LangGraph AI agent — async routes, Pydantic validation, and stateful graph execution with PostgreSQL checkpointing.
techstack.django: Prototyped data-heavy features with MVT pattern, ORM queries, and the built-in admin interface.
techstack.spring: Secured Cobamovil with Spring Security filters, managed schema evolution with Flyway, and documented the API with OpenAPI/Swagger.
techstack.postgresql: Production database in Cobamovil (JPA) and the WhatsApp agent (Prisma) — schemas, indexes, and RLS policies.
techstack.firebase: Integrated Genkit AI and real-time data sync in Defect Insights and MathScope via Firebase Studio.
techstack.supabase: Runs this portfolio's auth, storage buckets, real-time comments, and row-level security policies.
techstack.docker: Containerized the WhatsApp agent stack (Node.js + Python + PostgreSQL) and deployed it across Railway and Fly.io.
techstack.tailwind: Styled every React and Next.js UI — dark themes, glass cards, responsive grids, and custom components.
techstack.vercel: Deployed this portfolio and all Next.js apps — zero-config CI/CD straight from Git.
